$comment: Registry of every tool. The hub renders its cards from this and CI builds from this. route: 'mw' (scad listing on MakerWorld) | 'app' (own-site app) | 'both'. external: true = lives outside this monorepo.

generators.name: Image to Clicker
generators.blurb: Turn any image, logo, or custom text into a clicker fidget.

generators.name: Custom Keycap Generator
generators.blurb: Custom keycaps with icons, logos, or letters.

generators.name: Name Keychain Generator
generators.blurb: Personalized plate-style name keychains with live font preview, pixel & script styles, multi-language, 1 to 3 colour layers, and AMS & no-AMS printing.

generators.name: Large Customizable Box
generators.blurb: Large customizable print-in-place box. No hardware/screws required.

generators.name: Customizable Rugged Box
generators.blurb: Super customizable rugged box. Print in place, no extra hardware.

generators.name: Washer & Spacer Generator
generators.blurb: Customizable washer and spacer generator. Set ID, OD, and thickness.

generators.name: Desk Headphone Hook
generators.blurb: Adjustable desk headphone hook. Parametric to fit any desk thickness.

generators.name: Edge Mount Device Dock
generators.blurb: Customizable edge mount dock for devices. Customize to fit your phone, Kindle, or tablet.

generators.name: Screw-On Power Strip Holder
generators.blurb: Customizable screw-on power strip holder. Mount strip securely under desks.

sellerTools.name: Profit Calculator
sellerTools.blurb: 3D print pricing: material, time, margin, all in one.

sellerTools.name: Product Photo Tool
sellerTools.blurb: Upload your model, get store-ready product shots.

sellerTools.name: Listing Copy Helper
sellerTools.blurb: Generate Etsy & MakerWorld titles, tags, and descriptions.

sellerTools.name: Review QR Cards
sellerTools.blurb: "Scan to leave a review" cards to include with shipments.
